title: leonohebe lycopodioides
intro: Leonohebe lycopodioides, also known as the New Caledonian leonohebe, is a flowering plant species endemic to New Caledonia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Leonohebe lycopodioides has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and possibly exhibiting antimicrobial activity. However, I couldn't find information on herbal preparations using this plant.
